rulings.Case Title: MORROW VS ESTATE OF WENDELL F. FINCH
rulings.Rulings: HARRINGTON - GRANT AS TO COMMON LAW WRONGFUL EVICTION AND MALICIOUS PROSECUTION. NO SHOWING OF MALICE. DENY AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION UNDER THE SF ADMINISTRATIVE CODE. SEE BALMORAL HOTEL TENANTS ASSN. V. LEE, (1990) 226 CAL.APP.3D 686, 695 FN. 4. LARKIN - DENY IN ENTIRETY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER LARKIN "INSTITUTED" ACTION AND MALICE. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: BOERS VS BIO TREASURES INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Deft Metabolife International Inc'S Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS DENIED - PRESENCE OF TWO DEFENDANTS IN CALIFORNIA SUFFICIENT TO VALIDATE PLAINTIFFS CHOICE OF FORUM GIVEN AGREEMENT OF PLAINTIFFS TO COME TO CALIFORNIA FOR TRIAL. IN ADDITION NO SHOWING ALL DEFENDANTS ARE SUBJECT TO JURISDICTION IN IOWA. (JH)
